title: Prisma schema and migrations for Todo and ActivityFeedItem (PostgreSQL)
description: Introduce or extend Prisma for projects/todo-reference with PostgreSQL provider. Model Todo and ActivityFeedItem (feed entry) per architecture-brief DDD notes, including stable ids, ordering fields (e.g. occurredAt for feed), and optional minimal StubUser or session metadata if required for seed/E2E. Generate and commit migrations; no Prisma imports in domain/application layers. Document prisma migrate workflow against the compose DATABASE_URL.
acceptance: Prisma schema defines PostgreSQL models for Todo and ActivityFeedItem consistent with ubiquitous language in tasks/todo-mvp/architecture-brief.json (ids, content/completion for todos, display/sort fields for feed items).
Optional stub-auth tables or columns are included only if needed for seed/E2E and are named explicitly (e.g. StubUser) in schema comments or delivery notes—no production OAuth.
Initial migration(s) are committed; prisma migrate deploy (or documented equivalent) applies cleanly against a fresh compose Postgres instance.
Generated Prisma Client paths and any coverage exclusions are documented in architecture-brief coverage_scope_exclusions if integration coverage scope changes.
No @prisma/client imports under src/domain/ or src/application/.
